response.global_analysis: The video contains a comedic skit with dialogue between VTubers Kiara, Kobo, and several others in baby forms. No vocal music is present. I have transcribed the spoken English and Japanese dialogue, using on-screen captions as a guide for spelling and intent (especially for the 'baby talk'). Japanese speech has been translated into English. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio waveforms, and longer sentences have been split to ensure each block stays under 50 characters for optimal readability.

subtitles.original:
the blue kid has been suspended by the sky,
the sky anggyy!!!
subtitles.english:
The blue kid has been suspended by the sky,
the sky is angry!!!

subtitles.original: おしょしょ！
subtitles.english: Oshosho!

subtitles.original:
Oh, why would the sky be angry
about my sweet child?
subtitles.english:
Oh, why would the sky be angry
about my sweet child?

subtitles.original: She had treat the sky roughly!!
subtitles.english: She had treated the sky roughly!!

subtitles.original: おしょしょしゅ、おしょしゅ。
subtitles.english: Oshoshoshu, oshoshu.

subtitles.original: Hmph, I believe there's a misunderstanding here.
subtitles.english: Hmph, I believe there's a misunderstanding here.

subtitles.original: Please, bring her back to normal, I beg you!
subtitles.english: Please, bring her back to normal, I beg you!

subtitles.english: okay? And we'll talk about it.

subtitles.original: Can you stand up and walk normally?
subtitles.english: Can you stand up and walk normally?

subtitles.original: I know you can.
subtitles.english: I know you can.

subtitles.english: You've done this before, many years ago.

subtitles.english: All right, there you go!

subtitles.english: and do your best to walk on your own,

subtitles.original: Ah...
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: Kusogaki, not again.
